rules.title: Emergency fund first
rules.action: prioritize emergency fund before locking large FD
rules.why: liquidity is important for sudden expenses

rules.title: FD suggestion
rules.condition: if user wants low risk and 1-5 year parking
rules.why: capital protection is the primary goal

rules.title: Avoid over-allocation to FD
rules.condition: if inflation-adjusted return is too low for long-term goals
rules.action: offer blended options and planning split

rules.title: Income-savings logic
rules.action: focus on budget discipline before aggressive investing

rules.title: Fraud guard
rules.condition: if promise is guaranteed high return > 15% with urgency
rules.action: raise fraud warning and suggest verification

fraud_signals: returns too good to be true
